Title: Saiya-jin no môi! Kami-sama mo Pikkoro mo shinda
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Mayumi Tanaka
Plot: As Kami-Sama fades from existence while Piccolo dies, he tells Mr. Popo to go to Namekku-sei to retrieve their Dragon Balls; Gohan, in a rage, fights Nappa; Uranai Baba arrives at Kame House to announce Son Goku's return; Goku arr...
